case_title: CALIFORNIA BANK & TRUST VS. LARRY OTTEN et al

docket_entries.description: SUPPLEMENTAL DECLARATION OF MARTIN D. GOODMAN IN SUPPORT OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT ON STIPULATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF CALIFORNIA BANK & TRUST

CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CALIFORNIA BANK & TRUST AS TO DEFENDANT OTTEN, LARRY VELO, LUIGI ITALIAN IMPORTING, INC. SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR DEC-19-2008 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  SEP-15-2008 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         DEC-04-2008
NOTICE TO PLAINTIFF

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR FEB-02-2009 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). THE DEC-19-2008 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

STIPULATION FOR JUDGMENT FILED; THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING STIPULATED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CALIFORNIA BANK & TRUST RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT OTTEN, LARRY VELO, LUIGI ITALIAN IMPORTING, INC. $19,189.75 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $19,189.75, PRINCIPAL PLUS INTEREST. EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SACRAMENTO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT OTTEN, LARRY VELO, LUIGI ITALIAN IMPORTING, INC.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING STIPULATED AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CALIFORNIA BANK & TRUST RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT OTTEN, LARRY VELO, LUIGI ITALIAN IMPORTING, INC. $25,059.11 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $25,059.11, SEE SCANNED "AMENDED JUDGMENT BY COURT ON STIPULATION"
ABSTRACT ISSUED ON NOV.2, 2009 HAS BEEN RETURNED TO COURT: JUDGMENT HAS BEEN AMENDED. FILED BY PLAINTIFF CALIFORNIA BANK & TRUST
